title: Syndicate
description: A bunch of mods for a server, some centered around the create mod and some are random
body:
# Syndicate
A bunch of mods mainly for our small server with friends, but can be used on other servers.    

Starting from 0.1.1, all mods have to be voted on by server members

The mods have definitely been chosen with regards to balance, fun and usefulness and definitely not random mods found on Modrinth, and the carefully selected mods can be used to do... a lot of stuff.  
<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

they were randomly chosen with input from server members

</details>  
  
icon "borrowed" from [KinoFabino](https://bsky.app/profile/kinofabino.bsky.social)


for example:
- build a cool train
- build a cool factory that moves resources with a train
- use cc:tweaked to manage the factory with a pocket computer while you are visiting your friend
- kill your friend with a weapon from vanilla (cataclysm got removed due to lag)
- build a grave for them using blocks from rechiseled

There are tree(3)-1 possibilities!

You should probably check out the keybinds, there are conflicts.
